channel.title: FixTheVuln Blog
channel.description: Expert cybersecurity insights, threat analysis, and IT certification study guides.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Apr 14–Apr 28, 2026
item.description: 17 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 10.0. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: AI Security Trend Roundup — Apr 24, 2026
item.description: 61 curated AI security updates from OWASP GenAI, arXiv, Simon Willison, CISA, and 4 more sources covering Apr 17–Apr 24. Every item credited to its original author.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Apr 07–Apr 21, 2026
item.description: 11 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 9.8. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: AI Security Trend Roundup — Apr 17, 2026
item.description: 51 curated AI security updates from OWASP GenAI, arXiv, Simon Willison, CISA, and 4 more sources covering Apr 10–Apr 17. Every item credited to its original author.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Mar 31–Apr 14, 2026
item.description: 4 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 9.8. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Mar 24–Apr 07, 2026
item.description: 6 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 9.9. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ Study Guide: Everything You Need to Pass the CY0-001 Exam
item.description: Complete CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) study guide with domain breakdown, study timeline, practice resources, and exam tips. Free practice quiz included.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Mar 10–Mar 24, 2026
item.description: 6 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 10.0. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: 5 GenAI Data Risks Your Security Team Is Probably Ignoring (OWASP 2026)
item.description: OWASP just published 21 data-layer risks for GenAI systems. Here are the 5 most overlooked risks that should be on every CISO's radar — released during RSA Conference 2026.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Mar 03–Mar 17, 2026
item.description: 2 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 8.1. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.description: 11 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 10.0. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Study Guide: How to Pass the CLF-C02 Exam
item.description: AWS Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) study guide with exam overview, study tips, and free practice resources. Plan your certification journey with FixTheVuln.

item.title: AWS SysOps Administrator Study Guide: Everything You Need to Pass the SOA-C03 Exam
item.description: Complete AWS SysOps Administrator (SOA-C03) study guide with domain breakdown, study timeline, practice resources, and exam tips. Free practice quiz included.

item.title: AWS Data Engineer Study Guide: Everything You Need to Pass the DEA-C01 Exam
item.description: Complete AWS Data Engineer (DEA-C01) study guide with domain breakdown, study timeline, practice resources, and exam tips. Free practice quiz included.

item.description: Complete AWS Database Specialty (DBS-C01) study guide with domain breakdown, study timeline, practice resources, and exam tips. Free practice quiz included.

item.title: AWS Developer Associate Study Guide: Everything You Need to Pass the DVA-C02 Exam
item.description: Complete AWS Developer Associate (DVA-C02) study guide with domain breakdown, study timeline, practice resources, and exam tips. Free practice quiz included.

item.description: Complete AWS Machine Learning (MLS-C01) study guide with domain breakdown, study timeline, practice resources, and exam tips. Free practice quiz included.

item.description: AWS Security Specialty (SCS-C02) study guide with exam overview, study tips, and free practice resources. Plan your certification journey with FixTheVuln.

item.title: AWS Solutions Architect Study Guide: How to Pass the SAA-C03 Exam
